title: Almost Vanilla Tools
description: Minecraft tools with a bit of personality.
body:
# Almost Vanilla Tools
### About?
The Minecraft tools are a little boring, it just changes colors and have the same shape for every type. I tried to "fix" them giving it some unique and recognizable textures, even though, the objective is to maintain the classic style of Minecraft.
##
### What exactly changed?
All tools changed to have unique features.
- Wood: Basic shape, not too sharpy.
- Stone: Shorter than the others.
- Copper: Have a "bulky" feeling.
- Iron: Longer than the others.
- Gold: A lighter look and focus on it's being visualy ostentatious.
- Diamond: Stills the same.
- Netherite: A little golden detail.

![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae2018e236595b0274fa86da7f6790aa21329d09.png)
![Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d1eef98e661353e0ffbfea57c9348cfa347119a.png)
## 
### General questions
**[1] Can I use it for my projects?:** sure, just give the credits if it is public.

**[2] Can you make it for older versions?:** no, I have no idea how to make it, but if someone wants to, do it (with credits)

**[3] Will it be updated?:** probably

**[4] Any mod support?:** none, for now at least 
## 
### Contact
Bug reports, tips, requests, or anything else: almostdelled@gmail.com
## 
### You may also like
I have made other resource packs with the objective of maintaining the Minecraft feeling while changing things up. Check them out!

- [Almost Vanilla Potions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/almost-vanilla-potions)

- [Almost Vanilla Armors](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/almost-vanilla-armors)

- [Colored Enchantment Levels](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colored-enchantment-levels)
